scripts.postinstall: corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/api prisma:generate
scripts.dev: concurrently -n admin,user,api -c green,magenta,cyan "corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/admin-web dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/user-web dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/api dev"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/shared typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/admin-web build && corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/user-web build && corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/api build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/shared typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/admin-web typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/user-web typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @haodacai/api typecheck
scripts.deploy:check: corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm build
scripts.demo:prepare: corepack pnpm db:generate && corepack pnpm db:migrate:deploy && corepack pnpm db:seed && corepack pnpm build
